file_insights.purpose: Define comprehensive types for AI recommendation system

patterns_discovered: Detailed type enumeration for AI-related concepts
Comprehensive type mapping for recommendation generation
Nested type definitions with clear categorization
Systematic approach to defining input/output types
gotchas_discovered: Complex type system with multiple interdependent interfaces
Potential performance overhead from extensive type definitions
Need for precise mapping between different type structures
recommendations: Consider code generation for complex type mappings
Add comprehensive documentation for each type
Create unit tests to validate type structures
Consider performance profiling of type-heavy interfaces
